subject: Mobile responsive audit with screenshots at 375px
description: All our comparison screenshots are desktop (1440px). We need to verify all 4 pages at mobile width (375px iPhone). Take screenshots of each page at 375x812, identify any overflow, touch target, or layout issues. GoFundMe is mobile-first - our responsive story needs to be tight for the demo. Fix any issues found.

changes: Fixed horizontal scroll on Community (activity cards overflow-hidden)
Fixed horizontal scroll on Profile (discover cards overflow-hidden + avatar shrink-0)
Nav touch targets increased to 44px+ (py-1.5 -> py-2.5)
Footer link touch targets increased (added py-2)
useCountUp threshold lowered 0.3 -> 0.1 for below-fold stats on mobile
learnings: IntersectionObserver threshold 0.3 is too aggressive for mobile viewports where stats cards are often below the fold at 375px
